There will always be someone better on paper. Better looking. Earning more. More sorted. But dating and relationships aren’t about finding the “best” person. They’re about choosing someone even when they’re imperfect and standing by that choice. Situationship culture makes us believe there’s always something better waiting. But real love isn’t about options. It’s about consistency, effort, and staying. Taking this lesson into 2026. With love, Pri 🤍 [ dating, relationship, situationship, 2026 goals, love, real love, understanding ]

That scary decision you keep talking yourself out of? It might be the very thing that changes everything. I stopped ignoring the red flags. I did my research. I chose an opportunity that actually aligned with my values and the life I wanted for my family. Was it scary? Absolutely. But two years later, my life looks completely different and I’m so grateful I trusted my gut instead of my fear. Sometimes the risk isn’t jumping. It’s staying exactly where you are. Take the chance. Back yourself. Go after the life you keep dreaming about. 🤍 #workfromhome #womeninbusiness #onlineincome #mompreneur #financialfreedom

Æbhïßhêk Tîwærí

You sent an attachment.
I’m about to tell you something most people are too scared to admit: You don’t have a talent problem. You don’t have a luck problem. You have a HUNGER problem. See, while you’re scrolling through Instagram at 11pm wondering why you’re not rich yet... some kid in his garage is making his 47th sales call of the day. While you’re “networking” at happy hour... someone else is studying, practicing, bleeding to get better. While you’re waiting for the “right time”. .. your competition is TAKING what they want. Here’s the truth nobody wants to hear: Success has a price tag. Always has. Always will. Strained relationships. Missed parties. Lonely nights. Brutal mornings. That’s the invoice. Most people see that price and say “too expensive.” Winners pull out their wallet and ask “where do I sign?” In sales (hell, in LIFE), I’ve watched this movie a thousand times. The guy who makes one more call at 6pm drives a different car than the guy who clocks out at 5. It’s not complicated. It’s just uncomfortable. So here’s your homework: What are you willing to sacrifice RIGHT NOW that your broke friends won’t? Can’t answer? Then stop complaining about your bank account. Find your hunger or stay poor. Your move, Follow @salesgirlyangela #sales #entrepreneurship #success #motivation #highticketsales

You sent an attachment.
My grandmother had thyroid issues. My mom has thyroid issues. I genuinely assumed this was just my genetic inheritance something I’d manage eventually, not something I could meaningfully change. Then I read the research. Genetics is a factor, yes. But there’s a body of evidence showing lifestyle and environmental inputs play a significant role too…. and some of those inputs are things we’re doing every single day without knowing Our thyroid glands need iodine to function Most Indian kitchens keep salt next to the stove. Heat and light degrade iodine . Then we cook with it. Boiling destroys up to 40% of remaining iodine. Pressure cooking, up to 51%. So even if you’re buying iodised salt …and a lot of us are quietly using pink salt or unpackaged salt that has none , we’re cooking the thyroid mineral out of our food before it reaches us. Three things that actually matter: 1. Packaged iodised salt only. Pink salt and rock salt do not have enough iodine. 2. Add it after cooking, not during. 3. Store it away from heat and light. Not next to the stove. I cite peer-reviewed research for everything I say here. Important note: Note: if you have Hashimoto’s specifically (even if you haven’t tested for it), iodine recommendations are different — please check with your doctor before changing anything Sources: Iodine loss during cooking — Bongoni et al., PMC3791240 Heat and light effects on iodised salt — PMC10543208 #thyroid #IndianWomensHealth #ThyroidHealth #IndianWomen #WomensHealth
ayeshargoyal

Æbhïßhêk Tîwærí

You sent an attachment.
Atonement is one of those rare 10/10 films that you admire deeply, yet hesitate to revisit, because it hurts in a way that feels too real. Directed by Joe Wright, the film is not just a love story, but a meditation on guilt, memory, and the irreversible consequences of a single moment. It lingers long after the credits roll, leaving behind a quiet ache rather than cinematic satisfaction. Set against the backdrop of pre-war England and World War II, Atonement follows the doomed romance of Cecilia Tallis and Robbie Turner, torn apart by a lie born from childish misunderstanding. What makes the film unbearable to rewatch is not simply the tragedy, but the slow realization that everything could have been different. The pain comes from watching innocence collapse in real time, knowing that no redemption will truly undo what has been done. The film’s craft only deepens the wound. Dario Marianelli’s haunting score, especially the relentless rhythm of the typewriter, feels like time itself pressing forward without mercy. The long Dunkirk sequence is breathtaking, yet exhausting, capturing not heroism but despair, confusion, and the fragility of hope. Every frame feels intentional, every silence heavy. But the final blow comes in the last act, where the idea of atonement itself is questioned. The film dares to ask whether art, storytelling, or regret can ever compensate for stolen lives and lost futures. That revelation reframes everything you’ve watched, turning beauty into cruelty and love into mourning. Atonement is not difficult to rewatch because it is bad. It is difficult because it is honest. It reminds us that some mistakes cannot be fixed, some love stories do not survive time, and some films leave scars instead of comfort. That is why it remains unforgettable, and why watching it once feels more than enough. Rewatching it feels like reopening a healed wound, knowing the ending will not change, yet choosing to endure the sorrow again, which demands emotional strength many viewers simply do not have left inside. #cinema #film #movie #movies #cinematography
cinema.lexicon

Эта технология превращает обычную активность в почти неисчерпаемый источник энергии 💡✨. Просто невероятно, как Япония использует пьезоэлектрическую плитку, которая преобразует кинетическую энергию шагов людей в электричество 👣🔌! Каждый раз, когда вы ступаете, ваш вес и движение давят на плитку, заставляя ее немного прогибаться и создавать механическое напряжение. Это настоящий инновационный прорыв 🚀! #Япония #Знания #Факты #Энергия #Рекомендую Инновации Технологии Будущее Познавательно Круто -- うわー、これはまさに🔥！ 渋谷駅では、毎日約240万歩がエネルギーに変わっています🚶‍♀️⚡️🚶‍♂️！このテクノロジーは、日常の活動をほぼ無尽蔵のエネルギー源に変えます💡✨。日本のピエゾ電気タイルが、人々の足元の運動エネルギーを電力に変換するなんて、本当に素晴らしいことですね👣🔌！一歩踏み出すたびに、あなたの体重と動きがタイルに圧力をかけ、わずかにたわませて機械的な応力を生み出します。これはまさに**革新的な突破口**🚀！ 日本 知識 事実 エネルギー おすすめ イノベーション テクノロジー 未来 豆知識 すごい —h

You sent an attachment.
Finding underrated gems: day - 11 “Bandya” is a powerful and soul-stirring track that lingers with you long after it ends. Featured in the film Khuda Kay Liye, the song stands as a haunting reflection on faith, inner conflict, and the search for truth in a complex world. Its deeply spiritual tone and thought-provoking composition make it an unforgettable piece of music. Composed by Rohail Hyatt, “Bandya” blends traditional influences with a contemporary soundscape, creating a rich and immersive listening experience. The track is brought to life by Shaan Shahid, whose raw and emotive delivery adds intensity and depth to the song’s message. Featuring Fawad Khan, Iman Ali, and Hameed Sheikh, the song resonates with the film’s powerful narrative, capturing moments of introspection and emotional turmoil. “Bandya” isn’t just a song—it’s an experience that speaks to the soul, making it one of the most underrated yet impactful tracks of its time. 🎶 Credits and Personnel Song Title: Bandya Film: Khuda Kay Liye (2007) Composer / Music Director: Rohail Hyatt Singer: Shaan Shahid Music Label: Fire Records Language: Urdu Genre: Soulful / Sufi / Film tags #bandya #khudakayliye #rohailhyatt #shaanshahid #fawadkhan imanali hameedsheikh sufimusic soulfulmusic underratedsongs musicreels reelitfeelit songlover spiritualvibes pakistanimusic fusionmusic emotionalvibes aestheticreels trendingreels

在日本,研究人员正利用智能人行道将日常活动转化为清 洁能源。这些道路内嵌特殊的压电材料,可以从行人的 脚步中收集动能。当人们行走、奔跑或跳跃时,路面会轻 微变形,从而产生机械压力。压电晶体将这种压力转化为 电能。 这些能量可用于照亮路灯、为公共显示屏供电,甚至监测 行人流量。这种技术不仅减少了能源浪费,还展示了未来 城市的无限可能, 在东京、京都等城市的试验区,人们的每一步都在为绿色 地球贡献力量。科技让生活更环保,也让每一个脚步更 有意义 #日本 #科技 #创新 #可持续 #绿色能源 未来城市 环保 知识 事实 推荐 你知道吗

You sent an attachment.
Don’t waste your time. Naval Ravikant is a philosopher, entrepreneur, and the founder of AngelList. He’s known for his deep insights on wealth, happiness, and living a meaningful life. But beyond the startups and investments, Naval understands something most people ignore: time is the only currency that truly matters. You have roughly 4000 weeks on this earth if you’re lucky. That’s your lifespan. And yes, we hear that, but we don’t really remember it. We act like we have forever. We waste time on things we don’t want to do, on people who drain us, on work that doesn’t fulfill us. Naval is keenly aware of how little time he has, so he refuses to waste it. He doesn’t do things he doesn’t want to do. He doesn’t chase status or approval. He lives with intention, clarity, and purpose. Life goes fast. Every week you spend doing something you hate is a week you’ll never get back. Every moment you spend living for someone else’s expectations is a moment stolen from your own joy. Naval’s philosophy is simple: don’t waste your time. Protect it fiercely. Spend it on what matters. The clock is ticking, and you don’t get a second chance. Make every week count. Follow @thestoicroad for daily motivation. #purpose #motivation #inspiration #time #life [Mindset] [Time] [Purpose] [Life] [Awareness] [Intentionality] Speaker: Naval Ravikant
thestoicroad

You sent an attachment.
فيلم "وحيد في المنزل" (Home Alone) الذي صدر عام 1990 ليس مجرد فيلم كوميدي عائلي يُعرض في موسم الأعياد، بل هو عمل فني يلامس شيئًا عميقًا في داخل كل واحد منا. خلف الضحكات والمقالب الطريفة والموسيقى الميلادية الدافئة، تختبئ قصة طفل صغير وجد نفسه فجأة في مواجهة العالم وحده، فاكتشف في داخله قوة لم يكن يعلم بوجودها. في البداية، تبدو فكرة بقاء "كيفن" وحده في المنزل كأنها حلم تحقق. لا قوانين، لا أوامر، لا إخوة يزعجونه، ولا أحد يخبره بما يجب أن يفعل. الحرية المطلقة التي كان يتمناها أصبحت بين يديه. يأكل ما يشاء، يسهر كما يريد، ويجوب المنزل وكأنه مملكته الخاصة. نشاهد تلك اللحظات ونبتسم، لأن جزءًا منا تمنى يومًا أن يعيش تلك التجربة. لكن شيئًا فشيئًا، يتغير الشعور. مع حلول الليل، يبدأ الصمت بالتسلل إلى أركان البيت. يتحول المنزل الكبير إلى مساحة فارغة تعكس صدى الوحدة. الأصوات الصغيرة تبدو مخيفة، والظلال على الجدران تصبح أكبر مما هي عليه. هنا يدرك "كيفن" أن الحرية دون دفء العائلة ليست كما تخيلها. الوحدة ليست مجرد غياب الأشخاص، بل غياب الشعور بالأمان الذي يمنحنا إياه وجودهم

Regret hurts more than risk. ❄️ Follow @quiet.hustles for more mindset shifts. The Visionary Rebel Behind Oracle's Empire Lawrence Joseph Ellison, born on August 17, 1944, in New York City, is an American entrepreneur, investor, and philanthropist best known as the co-founder of Oracle Corporation, one of the world's leading software and cloud companies. Raised in Chicago after being adopted as a child, Ellison's journey from dropout to billionaire is a story of rebellion, brilliance, and bold ambition. In 1977, with just $1,200 and a daring idea, he co-founded Oracle, inspired by a CIA project he once worked on. Under his fearless leadership, Oracle grew from a small startup into a global technology powerhouse, revolutionising databases, enterprise software, and cloud computing. Known for his competitive spirit and perfectionism, Ellison built a reputation as one of Silicon Valley's most audacious leaders unafraid to challenge giants like IBM and Microsoft. Beyond business, he's a passionate sailor, pilot, and philanthropist, owning the Hawaiian island of Lanai and investing heavily in medicine and sustainability. From humble beginnings to one of the richest people on Earth, Larry Ellison's story is a testament to risk, vision, and relentless belief in the impossible. Tags: #viralreels #explorepage #realtalk #mindsetmatters #fyp reelkarofeelkaro quotes

Æbhïßhêk Tîwærí

You sent an attachment.
It generally saddens me how many times I’ve seen women in the gym doing endless burpees and crunches for months, seeing no results, getting disheartened, and eventually quitting. And the worst part? A lot of personal trainers and gym staff know this won’t work, but they still keep women stuck in the same loop because it’s the easiest way to make money. I don’t know why women are treated like easy targets in the gym — someone you can just hand basic workouts to and never actually teach the truth. They won’t tell you about calorie deficit. They won’t teach you proper weight training. They won’t guide you on how to build muscle. Because that takes effort… and “effort” is too hard for them, right? It’s honestly sad at this point. So if you’re a woman reading this, listening to this: Get out of that loop. Lift weights. Eat in a calorie deficit if your goal is fat loss. And become better, stronger, healthier — for yourself. #fitness #transformation #gymmotivation #gym #discipline #health #motivation #selﬁmprovement #girlgym

This page is for the quietly curious, the ones who think deeply, feel intensely, and are tired of surface-level advice. I’m a doctor by training, a storyteller by instinct, and everything here lives at the intersection of psychology, self-awareness, and everyday human behaviour. You’ll find ideas that name feelings you couldn’t explain, hard truths delivered gently, and moments of joy that remind you to stay soft in a world that rewards numbness. If you want content that makes you pause, reflect, and feel a little more understood ….you’ll feel at home here.

Roles like analysts, coders, designers, and even lawyers involve repetitive digital tasks — exactly the kind of work AI tools are getting better at every year. 𝗙𝗢𝗟𝗟𝗢𝗪' 𝘁𝗼 𝗝𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝟭% 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘆! . . يناير 2026، انتشر فيديو قصير بشكل واسع يُعرف باسم "الطريق العدمي" (Nihilist Penguin)، ويظهر فيه بطريق وحيد يسير مبتعدًا عن مستعمرته باتجاه الجبال الجليدية في القارة القطبية الجنوبية، بدلًا من التوجه نحو البحر للحصول على الغذاء. أهم تفاصيل الفيديو الموضح بالتريند: المصدر: المقطع مأخوذ من وثائقي صدر عام 2007 للمخرج فيرنر هيرزوغ بعنوان Encounters at the End of the World. الرمزية في 2026: أصبح الفيديو "أيقونة" ثقافية تعبر عن التمرد أو العزلة الوجودية لدى مستخدمي وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي، حيث يتم تداوله مع تعليقات تشير إلى "الرغبة في الهروب من الضغوط" أو "المشي نحو المجهول". التفسير العلمي: يرجح العلماء أن هذا السلوك ناتج عن خلـل في نظام الملاحة الداخلي للبطريق (GPS داخلي)، مما يؤدي إلى ضلاله الطريق ومواصلة السير بعيدًا نحو الداخل الجليدي رغم محاولات البشر أحيانًا لإعادة توجيهه. كما ظهر مؤخرًا (يناير 2026) فيديو آخر لبطريقين يفسحان الطريق لبعضهما على "ممر ثلجي"، وهو ما اعتبر مشهدًا يعكس "التعاون" بين الحيوانات لتوفير الطاقة. 438 5

Sundar dikhna achha hai, par sundar sochna ek luxury hai. Jab tum apne dimaag, inner self aur subconscious ko samajhne lagte ho, tab ek aisa deeply rooted confidence banta hai jo koi bhi hila nahi sakta. Irrespective of gender, log kya bolte hain, react karte hain ya judge karte hain, usse tumhein ghanta farq padta hai. Real power tab aati hai jab tum apne andar ke sawaalon ke jawaab khud dhoondhte ho. Apne confidence ki neev banao, kyunki tera confidence hi duniya ki sabse keemti property hai.

You sent an attachment.
Instagram is constantly changing, and every time you post, your account setup is being scanned by the algorithm. If your reach has dropped, engagement is low, or growth has stalled, it’s often not your content—it could be your account settings. Suggested Reels Snooze – OFF • Go to: Notifications → Suggested Reels → Snooze → Turn OFF • Why it matters: If this is ON, Instagram thinks you’re not engaging with recommended content. This limits your reels’ reach and reduces visibility on Explore and Reels tabs. Translate Voice on Reels – ALL • Go to: Settings → Language & Translation → Translate Text on Reels • Why it matters: Instagram scans the voice language in your reels. Selecting ALL languages boosts global discoverability and increases your chances of hitting international visibility signals. Account Status – Green Checkmarks Only • Go to: Settings → Account → Account Status • Why it matters: This is your account health score. Green checkmarks mean full visibility permissions. Warnings or violations can suppress your content, no matter how good it is. Fix flagged posts and request reviews to stay clean. Flag for Review – OFF • Go to: Settings → Followers & Following → Flag for Review • Why it matters: When ON, Instagram manually reviews your followers and content, which can trigger a soft shadowban. Turn it OFF to avoid unnecessary review queues. Remember: the algorithm isn’t just watching your content—it’s watching your account setup. If your backend isn’t set up right, even your best reels won’t reach their full potential.
shopwithayushi_

After 30, life feels harder because no one taught you these three things: 1. Finances: Earning is easy. Managing isn’t. 2. Comparison: Everyone looks ahead of you. But timelines aren’t the same. 3. Relationships & Dreams: Balancing responsibility and ambition takes maturity. Life after 30 doesn’t get tougher. It just demands better skills. . You’re allowed to ask for help. It doesn’t make you weak, it makes you human. Hi, I’m Anamika. I love helping women who are figuring life out, one messy step at a time. If you ever feel Confusing, stuck or just want someone to talk things: no judgment, no pressure. Comment “Clarity” to get started. I’m right here 💛 #LifeCoachForWomen #fyp #explore #motivation #selfhelp

You sent an attachment.
Recipe👇 Healthy Crunch Avocado Salad ✨ Inspired by @shredhappens 🙌 and had to try my own twist on it! Fresh, vibrant, and full of flavor 🥒✨ This avocado salad with customer, pomegranate, walnuts, and a touch of sumac is light, crunchy, and naturally dairy-free. The lemon and olive oil bring everything together for the perfect refreshing bite. ⸻ 📝 Ingredients • 2 large seedless cucumbers (shaved into ribbons or thinly sliced) or 4–6 mini seedless cucumbers • 1/2 small red onion, sliced • 1–2 avocados, cut into small cubes • 1/2 cup toasted walnuts, chopped • 1/2 cup pomegranate seeds • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped • Zest + juice of 1 lemon • 2–3 tbsp olive oil • Salt & black pepper, to taste • 1–2 teaspoons sumac ⸻ 👩‍🍳 Instructions 1. Thinly shave or slice the cucumbers and place them in a large bowl. 2. Add the sliced red onion and cubed avocado. 3. Add chopped walnuts and pomegranate seeds. 4. Stir in the fresh parsley. 5. Add the lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, and 1 teaspoon sumac directly over the salad and gently toss until everything is evenly coated. 6. Serve immediately for best freshness. All the tools and products I use and love for my videos — you can find them in my Amazon storefront via the link in my bio! ⸻ #AvocadoSalad #DairyFreeRecipes #HealthyEating #FreshSalad #sumac

You sent an attachment.
Founded in 2018 by Anisha Agarwal Saraf and Suyash Saraf, Dot & Key began as a small, self-funded skincare brand in Kolkata. Instead of launching a wide product range, the company focused on problem-based skincare. That focus helped it grow into one of India’s strongest D2C beauty brands. Anisha Agarwal Saraf grew up around the beauty industry. Her family runs Joy Cosmetics, giving her early exposure to how skincare brands are built. She studied chemistry and later completed a master’s degree in food technology, which helped her understand ingredients and formulation. Suyash Saraf handled the business side. He studied real estate finance at Indiana University and in London, and at Dot & Key he focused on operations, digital sales, and financial control. As he once said, “If you don’t make money every day, you don’t sleep at night.” Dot & Key was launched with ₹1 crore from the founders’ personal savings. The aim was to build skincare products that solved specific issues like acne, dryness, and sun damage using active ingredients that were still rare in India. The team kept improving products based on customer feedback, guided by the belief to “fail fast to learn fast.” In September 2021, Nykaa acquired a 51% stake in Dot & Key for about ₹97 crore. In September 2024, Nykaa raised its holding to nearly 90% after investing another ₹256–265 crore. FY25 marked Dot & Key’s strongest year. Operating revenue rose 113% year-on-year to ₹423.37 crore, while net profit increased to ₹56.09 crore from ₹15.48 crore in FY24, giving a PAT margin of about 13.3%. Based on a reported EBITDA margin of around 14%, the company’s estimated EBITDA for FY25 is about ₹59 crore. The small gap between EBITDA and profit reflects low debt and an asset-light structure. Looking ahead, Dot & Key plans to grow 2–3 times by FY27 through offline expansion, new product launches, and deeper reach across skincare, haircare, body care, and nutraceuticals like IKWI. With Nykaa owning close to 90%, a public listing in the coming years remains a strong possibility. #startupg #dotandkeyskincare #dotandkey #startupstory

This Silent Disease is Spreading Across Bengaluru — Most Don’t Know.. Bengaluru is facing a silent lifestyle crisis. Nearly 40% people may have fatty liver disease… and most don’t even know it. No symptoms. No warning. But slowly, it can lead to liver failure. IT jobs, long sitting hours, junk food, and stress are the biggest reasons. This is not just health news. This is a warning for Bengaluru. Check your health. Change your lifestyle. You sent an attachment.
This video isn’t saying “medicine is evil”. It’s saying blind trust is dangerous. Yes—pharma does save lives. But saving lives and keeping people dependent can exist at the same time. And that’s the uncomfortable truth most people never question. Most modern healthcare today is built around symptom management, not root-cause healing. Pain? Suppress it. Inflammation? Silence it. Fatigue? Mask it. Not because your body is broken— but because a body that truly heals doesn’t generate recurring revenue. Every pill is a transaction. Every long-term prescription is a subscription model. Healthy people don’t pay monthly. Patients do. This script questions: • Who funds medical research • Why prevention isn’t prioritized • Why nutrition & lifestyle aren’t central to treatment • Why regulation and corporations are financially connected Doctors aren’t villains. They’re trained inside a system that rewards prescriptions over prevention. If it doesn’t come with a barcode, it rarely makes the syllabus. The real message? Don’t panic. Don’t rebel blindly. Don’t outsource your health. Start simple: Eat cleaner. Understand your body. Ask better questions. Stop silencing symptoms—listen to them. Health isn’t a product you buy. It’s a responsibility you protect. A power you reclaim. Once you see the system clearly, you stop fearing symptoms… and start understanding them.#HealthTruth #BigPharma #MedicalSystem #HealthAwareness #HolisticHealth #RootCauseHealing #SymptomManagement #HealthcareIndustry #WellnessMindset #PreventiveHealth #FoodIsMedicine #QuestionEverything #ReelsThatMatter #TruthTalk #MindsetShift

Insane comeback😂 LeBron James is currently competing in his 23rd NBA season as a forward for the Los Angeles Lakers at 41 years old. As the league’s all-time leading scorer, he has pushed his regular-season total past 42,900 points while maintaining an impressive stat line of 22 points, 7.1 assists, and 5.8 rebounds per game. His longevity remains unprecedented, evidenced by his recent selection to a record-extending 22nd All-Star Game held at the Intuit Dome in Los Angeles. Although he continues to battle minor injuries like persistent foot soreness, he remains a central pillar of the Lakers’ rotation and recently became the oldest player in history to record a triple-double. Off the court, James is playing under a one-year, $52.6 million contract and has expressed uncertainty regarding his plans for a 24th season, choosing instead to focus on the current postseason push while hinting at a future interest in NBA franchise ownership.

They continued to plummet, eventually dropping by 63% before creatine was discontinued. After which, symptoms crept back up, but were still far below the starting level of depression. Creatine supports energy generation in the brain. That extra energy is why it boosts performance in the gym. But in the brain, more energy allows for: ◇ Neuron growth ◇ Faster neurotransmitter release ◇ Improved communication between brain cells PMID: 26457568 Now, there’s fair criticism here. It was a small study, no placebo, and in meth users. However, creatine’s antidepressant/anti-anxiety effects are not a one off. You walk into a hospital ward thinking it’s just another room, and you walk out changed. Between the rushing footsteps, trembling hands, and silent prayers, you realize how fragile everything really is. People aren’t asking for success or milestones there — they’re only asking for one more breath, one more heartbeat, one more chance. And that’s when it hits you that if you woke up today healthy, able to breathe without pain and stand without fear, you’re already blessed beyond measure. Health isn’t just something you have, it’s something you should be grateful for, every single day. #explore #medico #fyp

You sent an attachment.
Lack of sex can lead to weight gain — scientists say when intimacy is missing, the brain starts looking for pleasure in food instead. During sex, your body releases dopamine, oxytocin, and endorphins. When those feel-good chemicals drop, your brain looks for a quick dopamine hit somewhere else — usually in the fridge: sweets, fatty foods, high-calorie snacks. Sex can act as a natural appetite regulator: it lowers cortisol levels and temporarily reduces sugar cravings. Without intimacy, the brain searches for another source of pleasure — and food is often the easiest fix.
lastnightchat.s

Susmita sent an attachment.
1 regular Coke can = 130 calories 🥤 1 Diet Coke = just 3 calories This means you would need around 43 Diet Cokes to match the calories of just 1 regular Coke 😮 The reason is simple — regular Coke contains a high amount of added sugar 🍬, which increases your calorie intake without providing any real nutrition. These are called empty calories, and frequent intake can contribute to weight gain, fat storage, and increased cravings ⚠️ Diet Coke, on the other hand, contains negligible calories and no sugar, I m not saying to have Diet Coke but if u want to enjoy a fizzy drink it is a better option compared to regular Coke ✅ This doesn’t mean you should start consuming Diet Coke regularly ❌ The goal is not to depend on soft drinks, but to make better choices when cravings happen occasionally 🤍 Always remember, your daily choices add up 📊 Choosing lower-calorie alternatives can help you stay in a calorie deficit and support your weight management goals 🎯 Moderation and awareness are the key 🔑 Save this to make smarter swaps when cravings hit 💾 #nutrition #weightloss #dietcoke #coke #instagood

2006년 개봉한 영 (Labyrinth)은 단순한 판타지 모험을 넘어, 성장과 선택, 그리고 내면의 용기를 그린 작품입니다. 화려한 미로와 마법적 생물들 사이에서도, 영화는 끊임없이 “과연 진정한 길은 어디인가?”라는 질문을 던집니다. 복잡하게 얽힌 길과 신비로운 공간 속에서 주인공 사라가 맞닥뜨리는 도전은 관객의 긴장을 끝까지 유지하게 합니다. 사라가 동생을 구하기 위해 미로를 헤치고 나아가는 과정은 단순한 모험을 넘어선 자기 발견과 심리적 성장을 담고 있습니다. 특히 어둡고 좁은 통로, 반짝이는 환상 속 생물, 그리고 불확실한 길의 선택은 말없이도 긴장과 설렘을 전달하며, 조용한 순간일수록 모험의 무게가 더 깊게 다가옵니다. 영화의 분위기를 완성시키는 것은 신비롭고 몽환적인 음악과 세심하게 디자인된 미로의 시각적 요소입니다. 음악과 장면은 관객을 마치 사라와 함께 미로 속에 있는 듯한 몰입감을 선사하며, 액션보다도 사라가 선택을 고민하는 순간들이 더 오래 기억에 남습니다.

You sent an attachment.
That video captures a lighthearted and relatable “brain fog” moment featuring José Luis Escrivá, a prominent Spanish economist and politician. The scene took place during an “Ageingnomics” forum organized by the Fundación MAPFRE. While deep in thought and starting his speech, Escrivá attempted to pour a glass of water. • The Mistake: Instead of pouring the water into the actual glass, he mistakenly poured it into a cylindrical glass holder built into the lectern. • The Reaction: Once he realized the water was pooling in the stand rather than his glass, he stopped, laughed at himself, and joked about the complexity of the task, saying, “I thought this was more complex!”#fyp #viral #reels #trending #getnoticed

Chasing More, Finding Less — A Note on Success & Happiness In a world that keeps telling us to chase success, we often forget to ask why. Novel Ravikanth reminds us that ambition without awareness turns into endless hunger. Success can give you milestones, but happiness gives you meaning. The real win is not reaching the top, but being at peace wherever you stand. Because if happiness is postponed, success will never feel complete. #successmindset #happinessjourney #lifelessons #selfgrowth #perspective

You sent an attachment.
OATS : STOP EATING HORSE FEED. YOUR INDIAN BODY DOESN’T NEED IT. 🐴🥣 History doesn’t lie. For centuries, Oats were cheap livestock feed used to make animals heavy. Today, marketing has tricked you into thinking it’s a “Superfood.” Here is why I will NEVER recommend Oats to my patients: 1. THE GENETIC MISMATCH (Not Indian Food) 🇮🇳 Oats are a cold-climate crop (Scotland/Russia). They are heavy and mucus-forming. India is a tropical country. Our bodies need light, easy-to-digest grains like Millets (Ragi, Jowar, Bajra). Eating heavy oats in Indian heat creates Ama (metabolic toxins) and sluggish digestion. 2. THE GLYPHOSATE BOMB (The Poison) ☠️ Most commercial oats are sprayed with Glyphosate (a weedkiller) just before harvest to “desiccate” (dry out) the crop. Glyphosate disrupts your gut microbiome. You are essentially eating a mild antibiotic for breakfast. 3. THE PHYTIC ACID TRAP (Mineral Theft) 🦴 Oats are high in Phytic Acid, which binds to Iron, Calcium, and Zinc, preventing absorption. • “But I soak them!” -> NO. Soaking only works if the grain has live enzymes. Commercial oats are steamed (dead). Soaking does nothing. 4. THE FATTY LIVER COCKTAIL ⚠️ Mixing Oats (Starch) with Fruit & Honey (Fructose) is the fastest way to trigger Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD). You are spiking Insulin and Fructose at the same time. #oats #theanirudhcode #glyphosate #metabolichealth #hyderabad
theanirudhcode

You sent an attachment.
Why Nifty IT Crashed: The Anthropic Effect Explained A single software update just wiped out $285 Billion from global markets. 🚨 On Feb 3, Anthropic released "Claude Cowork"—a free plugin that automates high-value legal workflows. The market reaction was brutal: Thomson Reuters and LegalZoom crashed ~19% in a single day. But here is the wake-up call for India: Infosys and Wipro saw massive selling because the "Linear Headcount" model (Body Shop) is under threat. Think about it: If a US client can use a $20/month plugin for contract review, why would they pay $25/hour for manual work? The market is shifting from "Billable Hours" to "Enterprise Agents". 👇 Discussion: Do you think AI will force Indian IT to pivot this year? Let me know in the comments. Disclaimer: Not financial advice. Educational purposes only. No stock recommendations. #StockMarket #Nifty50 #IndianIT #AI #Anthropic #FinanceNews #ValueMarket #MarketUpdate #TradingPsychology #Economy #claude

You sent an attachment.
Most people think growth is about adding more. More habits. More discipline. More confidence. But real growth is subtraction. You lose the version of you that needed approval. You shed the patterns that kept you safe, not strong. You outgrow identities that once protected you. And yes that hurts. Not because you’re weak. But because your nervous system is learning a new normal. If you’re in that uncomfortable phase where nothing feels familiar anymore, you’re not lost. You’re becoming. Save this. You’ll need it when the old version tries to pull you back. I share what I’m learning while building skills, income, and options beyond the 9–5. If you’re working on yourself not just clocking in follow along @theasthav. Subha utho…pre workout Leke gym jao…gym se aake protein intake…room ko jharu pocha bartan kapre …nahao …puja karna..khana banana…kapre press tiffin varke Hospital timepe pohocho…hospital me v baithke kaam Thori rehta hai …chakkar marte rho is ot se us ot…hospital se ake nahao..khana banao…Dhule huye kapre fold karo…kal kya pehen na hai usko press …oats vigana..subah ka preparation krna…in sab me protein. Intake, hydration, calorie count and sleep cycle , usme v ek ghanta padhai krna minimum….gharkelogo ko call, frnd ko call, Itna sabkuch balance krke chalna Itna v easy nhi hai…mind 24*7 work krta hai
